tools.name: Claude
tools.verdict: My daily driver for everything from writing to coding to thinking.

tools.name: Claude Code
tools.verdict: How I build and manage this entire site. Game-changer.

tools.name: GPT-4o
tools.verdict: Still useful for certain tasks, but Claude handles most of my workflow now.

tools.name: VS Code
tools.verdict: The editor. Cursor is interesting but VS Code + extensions still wins for me.

tools.name: Astro
tools.verdict: Perfect for content sites. Fast, flexible, great DX.

tools.name: Vercel
tools.verdict: Deploy and forget. The integration with git is seamless.

tools.name: Supabase
tools.verdict: My go-to backend when I need a database. Postgres + auth + realtime.

tools.name: Linear
tools.verdict: Best project management tool ever made. Fast, opinionated, beautiful.

tools.name: Notion
tools.verdict: My second brain. Docs, notes, wikis, everything.

tools.name: Raycast
tools.verdict: Replaced Spotlight, Alfred, and half my menu bar apps.

tools.name: Arc
tools.verdict: The browser I actually enjoy using.

tools.name: Figma
tools.verdict: Still the standard, even if I use it less than I used to.

tools.name: Excalidraw
tools.verdict: For quick diagrams and thinking out loud visually.

tools.name: MacBook Pro M3 Max
tools.verdict: Overkill for most things. Perfect for everything.

tools.name: Studio Display
tools.verdict: One cable, great screen, mediocre webcam. Worth it.
